app.name: Work Abroad
app.demoBanner: This is a prototype — data is not real.

hero.title: Safe work abroad
hero.subtitle: We protect you at every step. You never pay to get a job.

safety.title: Safety
safety.body: Verified employers and a transparent process at every step.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: The full journey from application to arrival is visible in the app.

speed.title: Speed
speed.body: Apply in seconds; the platform helps with document preparation.

step1.title: Pick a job
step1.body: Country, industry, salary — all in one feed.

step2.title: Apply
step2.body: Short form plus a passport scan takes 3 minutes.

step3.title: Get approved
step3.body: Employer reviews and may request a short video intro.

step4.title: Visa & takeoff
step4.body: Documents and visa handled by us. No scams.

about.title: About us
about.intro: Work Abroad is a platform for safe international employment of blue-collar workers.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Replace scammer middlemen with verified employers and transparent processes. Never a cent from the worker — ILO 181 principle.

values.title: Our principles
values.respect: The worker is an equal participant, not a commodity.

hero.title: Hire verified workers in 14 days
hero.subtitle: Automated pipeline, built-in legal checks, pay only for results.

speed.title: Speed
speed.body: Up to 50 applications in the first week after publishing.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.body: GLAA / POEA / EPS — we verify licenses and paperwork for you.

tools.title: Tools
tools.body: Kanban, video responses, automatic SLA reminders.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits. First hire is free.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing teams, up to 10 jobs

trust.title: How we protect the worker
trust.intro: Six checks before an employer can publish a job.

1.title: Legal registration
1.body: We verify corporate records via OpenCorporates.

2.title: Licenses
2.body: GLAA (UK), POEA / DMW (Philippines), EPS (Korea). No license = no posting.

3.title: Corporate documents
3.body: Articles of incorporation, registration certificate, tax ID.

4.title: Video interview
4.body: Our staff interviews the employer's contact person.

6.title: Worker reviews
6.body: Every worker can leave an anonymous review after onboarding.

trust.pledge: Never a cent from the worker — ILO 181. Violations = ban.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Demo mode — pick a role, no password required.

welcome.title: Safe work abroad
welcome.subtitle: We protect you at every step. You never pay to get a job.

country.title: Where do you live now?
country.subtitle: This helps us match jobs with the right visa.

desiredCountries.title: Where do you want to work?
desiredCountries.subtitle: Pick one or several countries.

experience.title: Years of experience?
experience.subtitle: This helps us match the right jobs.

passport.subtitle: Fields are read automatically — demo only, no file is stored.
